title: SillyMods
body:
### This is a vanilla-styled Modpack based on fabric!
It mostly adds some nice to have QoL features, like [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) and [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights).
There's also quite a few optimization mods included!


<details>
<summary>List of Mods:</summary>

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV)
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/lhGA9TYQ)
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/n6PXGAoM)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/8shC1gFX)
- [Cloth Config v20](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/VSNURh3q)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/ETlrkaYF)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/uCdwusMi)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ha28R6CL)
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/9mtu0sUO)

- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci)

- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/yBW8D80W)
